name: Takamisawa Co., Ltd.
summary: Takamisawa Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells secondary concrete products, ready-mixed concrete, gravel, sand, cement, and other construction materials in Japan. The company also sells petroleum products; sells and maintains automobiles; undertakes civil engineering contracting and construction works; and transports freight cars. In addition, it is involved in the general waste/industrial waste treatment/disposal; construction demolition work and its collection/transportation; real estate sales/intermediation and management; non-life insurance agency; and golf range management businesses. Further, the company sells fruits, vegetables, and fertilizers; processes and sells food products and cheeses; imports and sells corncobs; and produces and sells mineral water and confectionery products. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Nagano, Japan.
